body.title: Seed memories in main.py stored without deposited_by — fill provenance at boot
body.result: Seed-time deposits now stamp source + metadata.deposited_by. Two label variants: 'seed:credentials' (CRED_* at main.py:975) and 'seed:habits' (PROC_* builtin loop at main.py:1141). Syntax-check passes. Commit cd624a7d. Next Igor restart should silence boot-time PROVENANCE_GAP 1-10.
body.description:
The provenance gate in cortex.store() logs PROVENANCE_GAP when memories land without deposited_by and falls back to 'unknown'. At Igor boot, ~10+ seed Memory objects in wild_igor/igor/main.py (credential refs, PROC_* habits, config nodes) trip the gate. Akien 2026-04-18b saw gaps #1-#10 in the log.

## Sample narratives (from log)
- 'OpenRouter API key — in .env OPENROUTER_API_KEY...'
- 'Confluence login email — in .env CONFLUENCE_EMAIL...'
- 'Discord bot token — in .env DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN...'
- 'Periodically check when the last backup was made and trigger...'
- 'Back up Igor's runtime state: DB, milieu, warm context, SOUL...'
- 'Check disk space when asked or after large ingestion tasks.'
- 'Word graph preparse routing — controls when word graph repla...'
- 'Adaptive routing from latency history...'
- 'Tune when Ollama preparse is skipped vs used. Low/high compl...'
- 'Save content to the active user's personal notebook when the...'

## Scope
- Find the seeding function(s) in wild_igor/igor/main.py that construct these Memory objects
- Stamp each with deposited_by='seed:main' (or a more specific label: seed:habits, seed:credentials, seed:config)
- Optionally set memory.source='seed' for query-friendliness — the existing 'seed' source is in the provenance module's NO_INFERENCE_SOURCES whitelist, so it won't trigger the no-inference warnings

## Implementation sketch
Add a single line like:
    for m in [mem1, mem2, ...]:
        m.metadata = (m.metadata or {}) | {'deposited_by': 'seed:main'}
right before the batch store, OR thread a source param through the store call.

## Success criteria
- Boot is silent on PROVENANCE_GAP for the seed path
- `SELECT metadata->>'deposited_by' FROM clan.memories WHERE id LIKE 'PROC_%' OR id LIKE 'CRED_%' LIMIT 10` shows 'seed:...' values, not 'unknown'

## Provenance
Akien-Claude 2026-04-18b, during /readigor follow-up observation.
